blocks.text: 27. Related party transactions The following transactions were carried out with related parties: (a) Key management compensation Key management personnel of the Group are considered to be the executive and non-executive directors and the Executive Leadership Team. Details of their remuneration are set out below in aggregate for each of the categories specified in IAS 24 “Related Party Disclosures”. Further information about the remuneration of individual directors is provided in the audited section of the Directors’ Remuneration Report on pages 44 to 61.
52 weeks ended 31 Mar 2018 £m Short term employee benefits 4.2 4.4 Termination benefits 0.9 0.5 Share-based payments 1.3 1.1
(b) Other related parties The Group’s associates are considered to be related parties.
As at 30 March 2019 the following are also considered to be related parties under the Listing Rules due to their shareholdings exceeding 10% of the Group’s total issued share capital:

− Nissin Foods Holdings Co., Ltd. (“Nissin”) is considered to be a related party to the Group by virtue of its 19.47% (2017/18: 19.57%) equity shareholding in Premier Foods plc and of its power to appoint a member to the Board of directors. − Oasis Management Company Ltd (“Oasis”) is considered to be a related party to the Group by virtue of its 11.99% (2017/18: 9.01%) equity shareholding in Premier Foods plc and of its power to appoint a member to the Board of directors. − Paulson Investment Company LLC, (“Paulson”) is considered to be a related party to the Group by virtue of its 11.98% (2017/18: 7.39%) equity shareholding in Premier Foods plc and of its power to appoint a member to the Board of directors.
52 weeks ended 31 Mar 2018 £m Sale of goods: – Hovis 0.3 0.3 Sale of services: – Hovis 0.7 0.7 – Nissin 0.2 0.1
Total sales 1.2 1.1 Purchase of goods: – Hovis 6.3 11.9 – Nissin 10.3 7.1

As at 30 March 2019 the Group had outstanding balances with Hovis. Total trade receivables was £0.9m (2017/18: £0.5m) and total trade payables was £0.6m (2017/18: £2.5m). 28. Subsequent events There were no reportable events after the balance sheet date.
Annual report for the 52 weeks ended 30 March 2019 117
